name: ASP Isotopes Inc.
content: ASP Isotopes is an isotope enrichment company utilizing advanced laser-based separation technology. The company is developing enrichment solutions for various high-value isotopes used in nuclear medicine, semiconductors, and next-generation nuclear fuel. Specifically, ASP Isotopes is targeting the production of High-Assay Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU) to meet the critical fuel requirements of advanced nuclear reactors, providing a Western alternative to Russian enrichment services.
